{{CargoClone
|name=Sleuth Doom
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=136
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|}}
